chunk_summary: This section outlines key guideline sources and year editions for local protocols on screening and classifying undernutrition, focusing on severe acute malnutrition (SAM) and related conditions in children under 5 years.
learning_objectives: Understand the key international and national guidelines for managing undernutrition in children under 5 years.
Identify the year editions of critical protocols for local adaptation in clinical practice.
Learn the diagnostic and management workflows for severe acute malnutrition (SAM) with complications.
Familiarize with pediatric tuberculosis diagnostic algorithms in the context of malnutrition.
key_facts: The WHO guideline on wasting and nutritional oedema in children under 5 was published in 2023.
India's Ministry of Health and Family Welfare (MoHFW) provides operational guidelines for facility-based management of SAM.
The ICMR Standard Treatment Workflow (STW) for SAM with complications was last updated in October 2019.
The IMNCI Chart Booklet for Medical Officers was revised in 2023 by MoHFW.
The NTEP pediatric tuberculosis diagnostic algorithm is a key resource for managing TB in malnourished children.
reference_quote: WHO guideline on the prevention and management of wasting and nutritional oedema in infants and children under 5 years — https://www.who.int/publications/i/item/9789240082830
